# Grounded by live API capture captures/20260415T162717Z-api_transmit_false_then_transmit_aapl.
# server_version=200, events.jsonl sha256 prefix: 003abb59dfced542.
# Account and perm identifiers are sanitized; the sequence preserves live paper
# Gateway behavior observed on 2026-04-15: a staged Transmit=false order emits
# no order lifecycle until the same order ID is modified with Transmit=true.
handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260415 18:27:18 Central European Standard Time"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU9000001"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":293}

client place_order {"order_id":"293","contract":{"con_id":"265598","symbol":"AAPL","sec_type":"STK","exchange":"SMART","currency":"USD"},"action":"BUY","total_quantity":"10","order_type":"LMT","lmt_price":"13.26","tif":"DAY","account":"DU9000001","transmit":false}
client place_order {"order_id":"293","contract":{"con_id":"265598","symbol":"AAPL","sec_type":"STK","exchange":"SMART","currency":"USD"},"action":"BUY","total_quantity":"10","order_type":"LMT","lmt_price":"13.26","tif":"DAY","account":"DU9000001","transmit":true}
server open_order {"order_id":293,"account":"DU9000001","contract":{"con_id":265598,"symbol":"AAPL","sec_type":"STK","exchange":"SMART","currency":"USD","local_symbol":"AAPL","trading_class":"NMS"},"action":"BUY","order_type":"LMT","quantity":"10","filled":"0","remaining":"0","lmt_price":"13.26","aux_price":"0","tif":"DAY","perm_id":"1426086044","client_id":"1","origin":"0"}
server order_status {"order_id":293,"status":"Submitted","filled":"0","remaining":"10","avg_fill_price":"0","perm_id":"1426086044","parent_id":"0","last_fill_price":"0","client_id":"1","why_held":"","mkt_cap_price":"0"}

client cancel_order {"field_count":"5","order_id":"293","manual_order_cancel_time":"","ext_operator":"","manual_order_indicator":""}
server order_status {"order_id":293,"status":"Cancelled","filled":"0","remaining":"10","avg_fill_price":"0","perm_id":"1426086044","parent_id":"0","last_fill_price":"0","client_id":"1","why_held":"","mkt_cap_price":"0"}
server api_error {"req_id":293,"code":202,"message":"Order Canceled - reason:","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1776270459000"}

sleep 100ms
disconnect
